فتاوى

Islamic Legal Rulings — Translated

FatawaLib is a curated archive of fatwas from senior scholars, translated for English-speaking readers. All content links back to the original Arabic source.

All Scholars Ibn Bāz Ibn ʿUthaymīn al-Albānī Muqbil al-Wādiʿī Yaḥyā al-Ḥajūrī
Business Transactions Halal and Haram

What is the ruling on working in a company that sells both permissible and impermissible goods?

Yaḥyā al-Ḥajūrī

Translations are provided for educational purposes.
